action.proof_term:
intro W A B hA hB
  have hAB : (A ∪ B).card ≤ A.card + B.card :=
    Finset.card_union_le A B
  have hsub : A ∪ B ⊆ (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin W)) :=
    Finset.subset_univ _
  have hpartition := Finset.card_sdiff_add_card_eq_card hsub
  have huniv : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin W)).card = W := by simp
  omega

intro W A B hA hB
  have hAB : (A ∪ B).card ≤ A.card + B.card :=
    Finset.card_union_le A B
  have hsub : A ∪ B ⊆ (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin W)) :=
    Finset.subset_univ _
  have hpartition := Finset.card_sdiff_add_card_eq_card hsub
  have huniv : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin W)).card = W := by simp
  omega

info.lean_statement:
∀ (W : ℕ) (A B : Finset (Fin W)),
      A.card ≤ 1 → B.card ≤ 1 →
      W ≤ (Finset.univ \ (A ∪ B)).card + 2

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
